title: potentilla kansuensis
intro: Potentilla kansuensis, also known as Kan Sue Potentilla or Kan Sui, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. It is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of western China, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and rhizomes. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Potentilla kansuensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases.
